name: pushover-commander
description: Pushover end-to-end toolkit: send notifications (+image attachment), emergency priority-2 with receipt polling, HEADLESS pushover.net web-control (create/delete apps + custom sounds via Playwright — the only way to mint an app token, since Pushover has no app-creation API), monospace incident-report PNG rendering (Satori/resvg), UUID-keyed JSONL verbatim audit + quota/heartbeat, and /loop briefings. Public + generic; per-user secrets stay private under ~/.claude (see references/private-config-setup.md).
